sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 14:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Terminology 14:1
items.html: Se’arot Dikna are called Mazla [dripping/luck], as it is written, “Water shall flow from his branches, etc.” This is so because their abundance drips bit-by-bit until they accumulate into the greatest lights in the worlds, and see below answer No. 29. (Part 6, Item 2)
